kw.name: Open Browser
kw.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Selected List Labels
kw.doc: Returns labels of selected options from selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=state' by label Uttar Pradesh.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=state' by index 2.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=state' by value Uttar Pradesh.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Selected List Labels
kw.doc: Returns labels of selected options from selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=city' by label Lucknow.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``labels``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Index
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=city' by index 2.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``indexes``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'id=city' by value Lucknow.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

errors.msg: Error sending stats to Plausible: error sending request for url (https://plausible.io/api/event)
